parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ category: 'deploy', lesson: $json.repo + ' deployed: ' + $json.last_message, source: 'github_pipeline', confidence: 1.0 }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { status: 'deployed', repo: data.repo || 'unknown', pipeline: 'GITHUB_DEPLOY', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ category: 'git', lesson: 'Push to ' + $json.repo + '/' + $json.branch + ' (' + $json.commit_count + ' commits) — skipped deploy (not main)', source: 'github_pipeline', confidence: 0.8 }) }}
